ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genetic_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived, draft) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the dataset is related to */,
  "tissue" TEXT /* Tissue type the dataset is related to */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Cell type the dataset is related to */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original data source */,
  "data_source_version" TEXT /* Version of the data source */,
  "data_source_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_datasets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code of the category (e.g., GO:0006629) */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original source of the category */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source */,
  "source_license" TEXT /* License under which the category is provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_code" TEXT /* Code of the term (e.g., BP) */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the term */,
  "ontology" TEXT /* Ontology to which the term belongs */,
  "parent_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent term */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original source of the term */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source */,
  "source_license" TEXT /* License under which the term is provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_parent_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "dataset_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-category link */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "over_represented_pvalue" REAL /* Over-representation p-value */,
  "under_represented_pvalue" REAL /* Under-representation p-value */,
  "numDEInCat" INTEGER /* Number of differentially expressed genes in the category */,
  "numInCat" INTEGER /* Total number of genes in the category */,
  "adjp" REAL /* Adjusted p-value */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset-category link (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset-category link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_categories_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genetic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genetic_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_enrichment" (
  "enrichment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term enrichment entry */,
  "dataset_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset-category link */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "pvalue" REAL /* P-value for term enrichment */,
  "adjp" REAL /* Adjusted p-value for term enrichment */,
  "numDEInTerm" INTEGER /* Number of differentially expressed genes in the term */,
  "numInTerm" INTEGER /* Total number of genes in the term */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the term enrichment entry (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the term enrichment entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrichment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_enrichment_dataset_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_category_id") REFERENCES dataset_categories ("dataset_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_enrichment_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene annotation */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the gene */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Expression value of the gene */,
  "fold_change" REAL /* Fold change of the gene expression */,
  "pvalue" REAL /* P-value for gene expression significance */,
  "adjp" REAL /* Adjusted p-value for gene expression significance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the gene expression entry (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the gene expression entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES gene_annotations ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genetic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metadata entry (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES genetic_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metadata entry (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_metadata_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metadata entry (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_metadata_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
